archetype.rationale: Named owner Rosa, family narrative in data, reviews describe personal attention and kids welcome — the owner is the differentiator.

runner_up_rejected.name: LOCAL TRUST
runner_up_rejected.reason: LOCAL TRUST fits the neighborhood angle, but owner identity is the stronger signal in reviews and notes.

customer_type.value: Families and neighbors who know Rosa by name

main_selling_point.value: Rosa's Sunday roast and personal attention in the dining room

competitive_advantage.value: Owner still cooking and greeting tables after 25 years on Elm Street

design_direction.tone: Warm and personal — like a neighbor inviting you in
design_direction.color: Warm amber and garden green from patio and kitchen
design_direction.imagery_priority: Rosa's food and garden patio over styled interiors
